name: Stellaris
description: Parses Stellaris save files (.sav) — empire overview, economy, technology, military, diplomacy, and more
limitations: Binary (ironman) saves not yet tested — text saves only
Planet section shows summary stats, not full district/building breakdown
Name resolution for wars and fleets uses raw IDs, not localized names

building_search.name: Building Search
building_search.description: Search Stellaris buildings by name or category. Returns build time and capital status.

civic_search.name: Civic & Origin Search
civic_search.description: Search civics and origins by name or category.

component_search.name: Ship Component Search
component_search.description: Search ship weapons, utilities, reactors, and combat computers by name, size, or component set.

size.description: Filter by size slot (small, medium, large, etc.)

edict_search.name: Edict & Policy Search
edict_search.description: Search edicts and policies by name or category.

empire_health.name: Empire Health Diagnosis
empire_health.description: START HERE for any general question about the player's empire — 'how am I doing?', 'what should I focus on?', 'any problems?', 'give me advice', or any broad empire status check. Scans economy (resource deficits and runway), colony stability (housing, crime, amenities), military (wars and exhaustion), politics (faction happiness), and external threats (hostile neighbors, crises, fallen empires) in one call. Returns problems ranked by severity so you can lead with what matters most. Always use this before diving into specific sections when the player asks a general or open-ended question about their empire.

job_search.name: Pop Job Search
job_search.description: Search pop jobs by name or category.

tech_path.name: Technology Path
tech_path.description: Resolve the full prerequisite chain for a target technology. Returns topologically sorted prerequisites with researched/remaining annotations.

tech_search.name: Technology Search
tech_search.description: Search Stellaris technologies by name, area, tier, or category. Returns cost, prerequisites, and research weight.

area.description: Filter by area: physics, society, engineering

tradition_search.name: Tradition & Ascension Perk Search
tradition_search.description: Search traditions and ascension perks by name or category.

trait_search.name: Species & Leader Trait Search
trait_search.description: Search species traits and leader traits by name or category.
